user_system_path: Master Audit #445 — Pass 8 (Trust, Privacy & Honest-Claims, EXPERT_PANEL.md §9). Forensic pass over public claim surfaces (landing, /pricing, /security, demo). Found a real false enterprise claim: 'SSO / SCIM' / 'SAML 2.0 ready' shown on landing + /pricing while NO SAML/SCIM/SSO is implemented (auth is consumer Google + AzureAD OAuth only). Fail-safe fix: removed the unproven claim from both surfaces (+ unused Users icon import), and hardened the forbidden-claim keep-list (scripts/continuity-gate.ts forbiddenClaimTerms) with SSO/SCIM, SCIM, SAML so it cannot regress. Bare 'SSO' deliberately NOT added (collides with 'processor'/'lesson'). Other claims verified honest (read-only, least-privilege, no-training, encryption, audit-logs=tkg_actions receipts, no surveillance, no customer-count theater). O-8.1 demo upsell copy left as forward-looking, recorded. Constraint: NO paid API calls.
allowed_files_raw: Pass 8 trust/claims record + removal of false SSO/SCIM/SAML enterprise claim from LandingPage.tsx (+ unused Users import) and app/pricing/page.tsx, plus forbidden-claim keep-list hardening in scripts/continuity-gate.ts (a governance-gate file, exempt from product contract scope). No schema, no deps.
required_browser_proof: gate:continuity green AFTER adding SSO/SCIM/SCIM/SAML to forbiddenClaimTerms proves no such claim remains in app/components/public; landing render already proven live (Pass 6) and the change only removes one strip item.
acceptance_condition: No public surface claims an unproven enterprise/compliance/customer capability. The SSO/SCIM/SAML claim is removed from landing + /pricing and the forbidden-claim gate now blocks its return. Record in docs/frontend/TRUST_HONEST_CLAIMS_AUDIT.md.
anti_regression_checks: gate:continuity green with active seam #445 AND with the 3 new forbidden terms (proves the claim is fully gone)
no remaining SSO/SCIM/SAML in app/components/public (verified by grep, false substrings excluded)
fix is removal-only on copy + an unused-import delete — no logic/behavior change
remaining 4 enterprise items + pricing line are all proven-true claims
stop_condition: Stop when Pass 8 is up as a PR with proof and merged; continue to Pass 9 (Vercel deploy).
next_command: Continue Master Audit #445: Pass 9 (Vercel deploy/config), then 10 (GitHub CI), 11 (observability), 12 (governance meta).
